params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. When omitted, all fields are returned.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results to return. Default is 50; maximum is 250.

items.docs: Return all Studio Ghibli films catalogued by the API.

params.name: id
params.description: The UUID of the film.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. When omitted, all fields are returned.

items.docs: Return a single film identified by its UUID.
